arts.ttl: Mark Robins emerges as early favourite after Championship rivals sack manager after just 19 games
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. Mark Robins has emerged as the early favourite to take over at Stoke City after Narcis Pelach has been sacked by the Championship club after just 19 matches in charge.

arts.ttl: Preview: Coventry City vs. Millwall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Championship clash between Coventry City and Millwall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
Tom Hill has a score prediction for all 12 matches taking place in the Championship on Sunday.
